pre_game.message: Hey, I’m C. It’s a bit surreal being in a room with so much on the line, isn’t it? What’s your name?
Hey C, I'm H. It definitely is—the energy in here is pretty intense. What’s your plan if you win?
Honestly, I’ve got family I really need to take care of, so it would go straight to them. What about you, H? What’s your motivation?
Pretty much the same—I've got people back home I'm determined to look out for, and this money would change everything for them.
I completely get that. It’s a lot of pressure, but it definitely keeps the goal clear.
Definitely. Have you had a chance to talk to anyone else yet? I'm curious what everyone's vibe is.
Not yet, I’ve mostly just been taking it all in. Everyone seems pretty focused and a bit on edge, which I guess is to be expected.
For sure. It's hard not to be when there's this much at stake. Do you think people are going to play it safe or go all out?
I think it’ll be a mix. Desperation can drive people to take big risks, but the fear of losing it all might hold some back. What’s your gut telling you?
My gut says people will talk about cooperating until the money is right in front of them, then it'll get cutthroat fast. I'm going to go see what the others are like—good luck, C.
You're probably right, money has a way of changing people's minds. Good luck to you too, H—hope it works out for your family.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the fair share.
Perfect coordination! Glad we all took the fair share.
I agree, it worked out perfectly for everyone.
